case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. WILLIAM F ESPIRITU et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT ESPIRITU, WILLIAM F AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-10-2010
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395 (B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-30-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUN-30-2010 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
